title: Recombinant DNA Technology
author: Dr HK Garg
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Recombinant DNA is the formation of a novel DNA sequence by the combination of two DNA fragments. It involves the method by which DNA of the donor organism (target DNA) is cut into fragments with the help of Restriction Enzymes and insert one of these fragments into the DNA of the host.
steps_raw: Recombinant DNA is the formation of a novel DNA sequence by the combination of two DNA fragments. It involves the method by which DNA of the donor organism (target DNA) is cut into fragments with the help of Restriction Enzymes and insert one of these fragments into the DNA of the host.
keywords: rDNA, Foreign DNA, Vector, Cloning, Chimeric DNA, Transformation, Plasmid, Therapeutic cloning
